create.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
create.joinLater: Create a workspace. You can join others later via invite links.

notFound.title: Workspace not found
notFound.description: This workspace does not exist or you don't have access.

chat.title: Workspace chat
chat.subtitle: Ask questions, plan work, and keep notes for “{workspaceName}”.
chat.welcome: Hi! I’m your workspace assistant for “{workspaceName}”. What do you want to work on?
chat.emptyLead: Try one of these to get started:
chat.suggestionNextSteps: Propose next steps for this workspace
chat.suggestionQuestions: What questions should we answer before we start?
chat.threadHint: This chat is saved to your workspace in this browser.
chat.assistantAck: Got it. Tell me a bit more about what you want to achieve in this workspace.
chat.assistantAckWithContext: Thanks — I can help. What outcome do you want, and what’s the current status?
chat.errorNotSignedIn: Sign in to ask the assistant.
chat.errorReplyFailed: Could not get a reply. Check your connection and try again.
chat.sourcesHintLead: See connected folders and indexed file names in

auth.notSignedIn: Not signed in. Please sign in and try again.
auth.apiNotConfigured: NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL is not set. Check your environment.

common.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.apiUnreachableHint: Check your connection and try again, or log out and sign in again.

documents.pageLead: You’re signed in. Connect Google Drive below so the assistant can answer from your files (read-only).
documents.pageLeadForWorkspace: You’re signed in. Connect Google Drive for workspace “{workspaceName}” so the assistant can use files for this workspace (read-only).
documents.pageLeadMultiSource: {workspaceName} uses Google Drive for its documents. The assistant only reads folders you choose (read-only).
documents.sourcesOverviewIntro: You choose which folders the assistant may read. It never sees your whole Drive—only what you pick.
documents.driveSessionExpiredLead: Your Google sign-in for Drive expired or was revoked. Reconnect to change folders or run a new sync. What you saved below still works in Chat.
documents.driveSessionExpiredFoldersLead: Folders and files below are from your last successful sync. Reconnect to Google to change folders or update files.
documents.reconnectLeadShort: Use your Google account again to manage folders or sync.
documents.sourceGoogleDriveSubtitle: Read-only. Pick up to 3 folders, then sync when you change them.
documents.indexedChunksInVectorStore: Saved for Chat: about {count} passages from your files
documents.reconnectPromptIndexedData: Google Drive isn’t linked right now, but your files are still saved so the assistant can answer questions. Connect again to change folders or pull the latest from Drive.
documents.pickWorkspaceLead: Google Drive is linked per workspace. Choose a workspace to connect Drive or manage folders.
documents.connectLead: Link your Google account so the assistant can read your Drive files (read-only).
documents.adminMustEnableDrive: Your workspace admin needs to enable Google Drive first (one-time setup).
documents.chooseFoldersLead: Pick up to {max} folders—the assistant only reads those, not your whole Drive.
documents.manageFoldersLead: Your folders are set. Change them or tap Sync to refresh what the assistant can use.
documents.connectFailedStart: Could not start Google Drive connection.
documents.oauthErrorMissingParams: Google sign-in did not return all required parameters. Close this tab and try connecting again.
documents.oauthErrorStateInvalid: The connection request expired or was invalid. Go back and try connecting Google Drive again.
documents.oauthErrorDriveNotConfigured: Google Drive is not configured on the server. Ask your admin to set the Google OAuth credentials.
documents.oauthErrorNoRefreshToken: Google did not return a refresh token. Try again and ensure you grant all requested permissions.
documents.oauthErrorTokenExchangeFailed: Could not complete Google sign-in. Try again in a moment.
documents.oauthErrorUnknown: Could not connect Google Drive. Try again.
documents.noJobId: No job ID returned. Check API logs.
documents.doneNoFiles: No usable files were found in those folders (we support Google Docs, Sheets, Slides, and common text files).
documents.doneWithCounts: Done. Saved about {chunks} passages from {files} file(s). You can ask in Chat.
documents.indexingSlow: Indexing is taking longer than expected. Check Chat in a minute.
documents.apiUnreachable: Could not reach the API. Is it running?
documents.modalHint: Only these folders are used. Files inside subfolders count too.
documents.noFoldersInRoot: No folders found in Drive root.
documents.indexedFilesEmpty: No files found in these folders yet. Run sync after adding files.
